meta.description: Common built-in Audio Studio algorithm library. This file is loaded before platform JSON and is not treated as a project.

module_types.description: Local or staged audio file source used to feed a pipeline with repeatable test content.

notes.summary: Local or staged audio file source used to feed a pipeline with repeatable test content.
use_cases: Demo input for GitHub Pages and local backend
configuration_tips: Use 48 kHz content when validating A2 demo pipelines.
Enable Loop Playback for continuous probe visualization.

module_types.description: Microphone capture source for voice front-end pipelines.

notes.summary: Microphone capture source for voice front-end pipelines.
configuration_tips: Enable DC Block for real microphone input.
Use high-pass filtering to reduce handling noise.

module_types.description: Audio sink that represents speaker, file, or host output.

notes.summary: Audio sink that represents speaker, file, or host output.
configuration_tips: Keep Safety Limiter enabled in demos to avoid clipped output.

module_types.description: Acoustic Echo Cancellation removes loudspeaker echo from microphone capture.

notes.summary: Acoustic Echo Cancellation removes loudspeaker echo from microphone capture.
configuration_tips: Increase Tail Length for large rooms.
Use ERLE Target to tune convergence quality.
validation: Monitor residual echo on output probe.
Compare RMS In/Out and ERLE during far-end playback.

module_types.description: Multi-microphone beamformer enhances speech from a preferred direction.

notes.summary: Multi-microphone beamformer enhances speech from a preferred direction.
configuration_tips: Set Mode to full adaptive for dynamic scenes.
Tune Look Direction when microphone geometry is known.

module_types.description: Noise Suppression reduces stationary and slowly varying background noise.

notes.summary: Noise Suppression reduces stationary and slowly varying background noise.
configuration_tips: Higher aggressiveness removes more noise but may affect speech naturalness.

module_types.description: Automatic Gain Control keeps speech level stable for downstream modules.

notes.summary: Automatic Gain Control keeps speech level stable for downstream modules.
configuration_tips: Short attack catches sudden loud speech.
Longer release avoids pumping artifacts.

module_types.description: Voice Activity Detection reports whether speech is present.

notes.summary: Voice Activity Detection reports whether speech is present.
configuration_tips: Increase Hangover to prevent choppy speech segments.

module_types.description: Keyword Spotting detects configured wake words from voice features.

notes.summary: Keyword Spotting detects configured wake words from voice features.
configuration_tips: Higher sensitivity improves recall but may increase false accepts.

module_types.description: Equalizer shapes playback or voice frequency response.

notes.summary: Equalizer shapes playback or voice frequency response.
configuration_tips: Use Preset as coarse mode, then adjust band gains.

module_types.description: Dynamic Range Compression controls loudness and protects downstream output.

notes.summary: Dynamic Range Compression controls loudness and protects downstream output.
configuration_tips: Lower threshold and higher ratio increase compression strength.

module_types.description: Mixer combines multiple streams into one output bus.

notes.summary: Mixer combines multiple streams into one output bus.
configuration_tips: Enable Normalize Mix when summing multiple full-scale sources.

module_types.description: Volume applies runtime gain and mute control.

notes.summary: Volume applies runtime gain and mute control.
configuration_tips: Use Mute for safe A/B testing without deleting connections.

module_types.description: Sample Rate Converter changes stream sample rate between clock domains.

notes.summary: Sample Rate Converter changes stream sample rate between clock domains.
configuration_tips: Use High quality for offline playback; Low Latency for tight real-time paths.

module_types.description: Asynchronous SRC compensates independent clock domains.

notes.summary: Asynchronous SRC compensates independent clock domains.
configuration_tips: Use Adaptive tracking when source and sink clocks are not locked.

module_types.description: Delay provides sample-accurate time offset or simple echo effect.

notes.summary: Delay provides sample-accurate time offset or simple echo effect.
configuration_tips: Keep Feedback at 0 for pure alignment delay.

module_types.description: Neural denoiser uses model-based enhancement for difficult acoustic scenes.

notes.summary: Neural denoiser uses model-based enhancement for difficult acoustic scenes.
configuration_tips: Use NPU Delegate Auto for product demos; CPU mode is useful for debugging.
